name: ai-manga-reader-platform
description: AI Manga & Comics Reader – global mobile-first SaaS

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.share: concurrently -k -n dev,tunnel -c blue,magenta "npm run dev" "npm run tunnel"
scripts.test: npm run test -w server && npm run test -w client
